title: Fluree: Data + Context for AI and Apps | Product Hunt
excerpt: Fluree is an enterprise AI data platform and verifiable knowledge graph database that combines immutability, security, and semantic graph capabilities. It operates as a unified intelligence layer, helping organizations connect fragmented information into a single "source of truth" to power zero-hallucination AI agents, analytics, and decentralized data sharing
content_html: Fluree is an enterprise AI data platform and verifiable knowledge graph database that combines immutability, security, and semantic graph capabilities. It operates as a unified intelligence layer, helping organizations connect fragmented information into a single "source of truth" to power zero-hallucination AI agents, analytics, and decentralized data sharing

It operates as a unified intelligence layer, helping organizations connect fragmented information into a single "source of truth" to power zero-hallucination AI agents, analytics, and decentralized data sharing

sentences.en: Fluree is an enterprise AI data platform and verifiable knowledge graph database that combines immutability, security, and semantic graph capabilities.
sentences.zh: Fluree 是一个企业人工智能数据平台和可验证的知识图谱数据库，结合了不变性、安全性和语义图功能。

sentences.en: It operates as a unified intelligence layer, helping organizations connect fragmented information into a single "source of truth" to power zero-hallucination AI agents, analytics, and decentralized data sharing
sentences.zh: 它作为统一的情报层运行，帮助组织将碎片信息连接成单一的“事实来源”，以支持零幻觉人工智能代理、分析和去中心化数据共享

content_html_zh: Fluree 是一个企业人工智能数据平台和可验证的知识图谱数据库，结合了不变性、安全性和语义图功能。 它作为统一的情报层运行，帮助组织将碎片信息连接成单一的“事实来源”，以支持零幻觉人工智能代理、分析和去中心化数据共享
